Package org.openapitools.codegen.languages.features

Interface CXFExtServerFeatures

All Superinterfaces:
BeanValidationExtendedFeatures, BeanValidationFeatures, CXFFeatures, CXFServerFeatures, GzipFeatures, JbossFeature, LoggingFeatures, SpringFeatures, SwaggerFeatures, SwaggerUIFeatures

JavaCXFExtServerCodegen
